prompt: Create a simple particle fountain in one HTML file using canvas. Particles emit from the bottom center, rise upward with slight random horizontal drift, fade out as they reach the top. 200 particles max. Each particle: random color from a warm palette (red/orange/yellow), size 2-5px, gradually shrinks. Gravity pulls particles back down in an arc. Black background. Continuous animation loop.

test_cases.name: Creative page keeps a real visual surface instead of only shell text

steps.expression: (()=>{const surf=document.querySelector('canvas,svg'); if(surf) return true; return document.querySelectorAll('[class*=card], section, article').length>=4;})()

test_cases.name: Particle controls or canvas interaction visibly change the simulation state

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const broken=/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]| undefined | nan /i.test(text);const media=[...document.querySelectorAll('canvas,svg,img,video')].some(visible);const surface=[...document.querySelectorAll('main,section,article,div,table,ul,ol,canvas,svg,img,video')].some(el=>{if(!visible(el))return false;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width*r.height>=1200;});return !broken&&(media||text.length>=20||surface);})()

test_cases.name: Canvas has non-trivial pixel data

steps.expression: (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas');if(!c)return false;try{const ctx=c.getContext('2d');const d=ctx.getImageData(c.width/4,c.height/4,c.width/2,c.height/2).data;let n=0;for(let i=0;i<d.length;i+=16){if(d[i]+d[i+1]+d[i+2]>30)n++;}return n>d.length/64;}catch(e){return true;}})()

test_cases.name: Particles emit from bottom center (y > 50% of canvas)

steps.expression: (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas');if(!c)return false;try{const ctx=c.getContext('2d');const d=ctx.getImageData(0,c.height*0.7,c.width,c.height*0.3).data;let bright=0;for(let i=0;i<d.length;i+=16){if(d[i]+d[i+1]+d[i+2]>50)bright++;}return bright>20;}catch(e){return true;}})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Canvas renders with particles

prompt: Create a starry particle background using Canvas in a single HTML file. 200 stars (white dots with random sizes of 1-3px) slowly twinkle on a dark blue background (opacity cycling between 0.3-1.0). Occasional shooting stars streak across (fast-moving bright lines with fading trails, random directions, appearing every 5 seconds). Nearby stars shift slightly when the mouse moves (parallax effect). Fullscreen Canvas.

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Canvas renders with star particles

prompt: Build a mouse-trail particle system in one HTML file using canvas. Particles continuously emit from the mouse cursor position as it moves. Each particle: random velocity outward from cursor, random color from rainbow spectrum, starts at 4px and shrinks to 0 over 2 seconds, has slight gravity pulling downward. Trail fades: previous frame drawn with low-opacity black overlay (creates trailing ghost effect). Click spawns a burst of 50 particles in all directions. Particle count display in corner. FPS counter. Full-screen canvas, dark background.

test_cases.name: Canvas has non-trivial pixel data

steps.expression: (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas');if(!c)return false;try{const ctx=c.getContext('2d');const d=ctx.getImageData(c.width/4,c.height/4,c.width/2,c.height/2).data;let n=0;for(let i=0;i<d.length;i+=16){if(d[i]+d[i+1]+d[i+2]>30)n++;}return n>d.length/64;}catch(e){return true;}})()

prompt: Create a firework particle effect in a single HTML file using Canvas rendering. Click anywhere on the screen to launch a firework: a launch particle rises from the bottom to the click height, then explodes into 100-200 colored particles (spherical spread with gravity fall). Particle colors: random color scheme per explosion (Red/Blue/Gold/Green series with brightness variation). Trail effect: implemented using semi-transparent black overlay. Sound: optional (Web Audio short explosion sound). Support multiple simultaneous fireworks. Rapid fire supported with continuous clicking. Deep blue night sky background with bottom city skyline silhouette (simple rectangles).

test_cases.name: Canvas renders with city skyline background

prompt: Create a fluid-like particle simulation in one HTML file using canvas. 500 particles that behave like liquid: they fall with gravity, pool at the bottom, and flow around obstacles. Two fixed circular obstacles in the middle of the screen. Particles collide with obstacles and each other (simple repulsion). Click to drop a cluster of 50 new particles at cursor position. Color particles by velocity (slow=blue, fast=white). Shake effect: press Space to apply random force to all particles. Viscosity slider (low=water, high=honey). Particle count display. Dark background.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const surface=document.querySelector('canvas,svg');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=range],select')].filter(visible).length;const darkHint=true;let themeOk=true;if(darkHint){const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];if(nums.length>=3){themeOk=Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<360;}}return surface!==null&&themeOk&&(controls>=1||(document.body.innerText||'').trim().length>=20);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["500"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "canvas", "gte": 1}, {"selector": "input[type=range]", "gte": 1}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=1)&&(structureHits>=1);})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Canvas renders with particles

prompt: Create an audio visualization particle system, single HTML file, Canvas rendering. Simulate audio spectrum data (32 frequency bands) using sine waves. 1000 particles arranged in a ring, each particle's Y offset driven by corresponding frequency values to form a wave effect. Particle colors vary with frequency (low=blue, mid=green, high=red). Display 'Now Playing' text in the center. The entire ring rotates slowly. Pause rotation on mouse hover. Frequency and amplitude adjustable via two sliders. Three buttons to switch visualization modes: Ring/Bar/Waveform. Dark background with neon effects (glow).

test_cases.name: Canvas renders with ring visualization

prompt: Build a galaxy particle simulation in one HTML file using canvas. 10000 particles forming a spiral galaxy. Parameters: 3 spiral arms, rotation speed, arm tightness, particle spread (all adjustable via sliders). Particles colored by distance from center (white core → blue mid → red outer). Central bright core glow effect. Dust lanes (darker regions between arms). Background: distant star field (500 tiny static dots). Mouse orbit: drag to rotate view angle (fake 3D by scaling Y coordinates). Zoom: mouse wheel. Star formation: click to create a bright new cluster of 200 particles. Nebula cloud effect: semi-transparent large circles with gradient. FPS counter. Reset button.

test_cases.name: Canvas renders galaxy visualization

prompt: Create a particle text morphing effect in one HTML file using canvas. Type text in an input field. The text is rendered to a hidden canvas, then particle positions are sampled from the text pixels. 2000 particles smoothly animate from their current positions to form the new text shape. When idle, particles drift randomly with subtle noise movement. Transition: old text dissolves (particles scatter), new text assembles (particles converge). Color: gradient across the text (left=cyan, right=magenta). Mouse repulsion: moving mouse near particles pushes them away temporarily. Particle trail effect. Background: dark with subtle grid. Font size slider. Animation speed slider.

test_cases.name: Particle system visibly animates over time

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const broken=/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]| undefined | nan /i.test(text);const media=[...document.querySelectorAll('canvas,svg,img,video')].some(visible);const surface=[...document.querySelectorAll('main,section,article,div,table,ul,ol,canvas,svg,img,video')].some(el=>{if(!visible(el))return false;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width*r.height>=1200;});return !broken&&(media||text.length>=20||surface);})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const surface=document.querySelector('canvas,svg');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=range],select')].filter(visible).length;const darkHint=true;let themeOk=true;if(darkHint){const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];if(nums.length>=3){themeOk=Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<360;}}return surface!==null&&themeOk&&(controls>=1||(document.body.innerText||'').trim().length>=20);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["2000"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Create a bouncing balls simulation in one HTML file using canvas. 10 colored circles of different sizes (10-30px radius) bouncing inside a rectangular boundary. Physics: gravity, elastic wall collisions (bounce with energy loss 0.9), ball-to-ball collisions. Click to add a new random ball. Balls leave a fading trail. Black background.

test_cases.name: Canvas has non-trivial pixel data

steps.expression: (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas');if(!c)return false;try{const ctx=c.getContext('2d');const d=ctx.getImageData(c.width/4,c.height/4,c.width/2,c.height/2).data;let n=0;for(let i=0;i<d.length;i+=16){if(d[i]+d[i+1]+d[i+2]>30)n++;}return n>d.length/64;}catch(e){return true;}})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Build a pendulum wave simulation in one HTML file using canvas. 15 pendulums of increasing length hanging from a horizontal bar. Release all simultaneously — they oscillate at different frequencies creating mesmerizing wave patterns. Physics: simple harmonic motion, period proportional to sqrt(length). Trail lines showing recent path. Slow-motion toggle (0.25x speed). Pause/resume. Gravity slider. Damping slider. Reset button. Dark background with colored pendulum bobs (rainbow gradient left to right).

prompt: Create a spring-mass system visualization as a single HTML file using Canvas rendering. Implement a horizontal spring chain consisting of 10 masses (spheres) connected by springs (wavy lines) with both ends fixed. Allow users to click and drag any mass to displace it from its equilibrium position; upon release, the spring system oscillates. Physics simulation should implement Hooke's Law (F=-kx) with damping. Springs must be visually rendered as sine wave patterns that appear denser when compressed and sparser when stretched. Include an energy display panel showing kinetic energy (red bar), potential energy (blue bar), and total energy (green line). Provide individual sliders for adjusting the spring constant k and damping coefficient b. Add a gravity toggle switch that causes the masses to sag when enabled. Display motion trail lines showing the trajectory of each mass.

test_cases.name: Canvas renders spring-mass system

prompt: Create a double pendulum chaos visualization in one HTML file using canvas. A double pendulum (two linked arms with bobs). Physics: Lagrangian mechanics equations for double pendulum (chaotic motion). Draw the trail of the second bob as a colored line that fades over time. Color the trail by velocity (slow=blue, fast=red). Click anywhere to set new initial angle. Parameters: arm lengths (2 sliders), bob masses (2 sliders), gravity slider. Show energy conservation graph (kinetic + potential over time, small SVG chart). Reset. Pause/play. Dark background.

test_cases.name: Canvas renders double pendulum

prompt: Build a cloth simulation in one HTML file using canvas. A 30x30 grid of particles connected by spring constraints. Top row pinned. Physics: Verlet integration, gravity, wind force. Mouse interaction: click and drag to grab and pull cloth, right-click to tear (break constraints permanently). Wind: toggle on/off with direction controls (left/right buttons). Cloth rendered as a colored mesh (triangles filled based on stress: relaxed=blue, stretched=yellow, near-breaking=red). Self-collision (cloth doesn't pass through itself). Pin/unpin particles (Shift+click). Obstacles: a sphere that cloth drapes over (draggable). Reset button. Performance: 60fps target.

prompt: Create a fluid dynamics visualization in a single HTML file using Canvas rendering. Implement a 2D fluid simulation (simplified Navier-Stokes) on a 200x150 grid, using color to represent flow velocity (blue = slow, red = fast). Mouse drag injects fluid (in the drag direction) and dye (random colors). Obstacles: Press the O key to place circular obstacles at the mouse position; fluid flows around them. Make vortices visible (using streamlines or particle tracing). Parameters: Viscosity slider, diffusion rate slider, resolution selection (Low/Medium/High). Visualization modes: Velocity field / Pressure field / Vorticity field (switch between 3 buttons with different colormaps). Pause/Play. Clear button. FPS counter. Black background.

test_cases.name: Canvas renders fluid simulation

prompt: Create a gravitational N-body simulation in one HTML file using canvas. 5 initial bodies (planets) with different masses (shown by circle size) and colors. Physics: Newtonian gravity between all pairs, Euler integration. Trail lines behind each body (fade over time, colored matching body). Click to add a new body (initial velocity from drag direction and length). Mass slider for new bodies. Time speed slider (0.1x-5x). Merge on collision (conserve momentum and mass). Predict orbit: hold Shift to see predicted path as dotted line before releasing new body. Zoom (scroll wheel) and pan (middle-mouse-drag). Energy graph (total kinetic + potential over time). Preset scenarios: binary star, solar system, figure-8. Center of mass crosshair. Grid overlay toggle. Dark space background with star noise.

test_cases.name: Canvas renders planets with trails

prompt: Create a random geometric pattern generator in one HTML file using canvas. Each page load generates a unique pattern: 50-100 random shapes (circles, rectangles, triangles) with random positions, sizes (10-80px), colors (pastel palette), and rotations. Shapes have varying opacity (0.3-0.8). 'Regenerate' button creates a new pattern. 'Save as PNG' button. White background. Minimal overlapping.

prompt: Build a fractal tree generator in one HTML file using canvas. Recursive branching tree that grows from bottom center. Parameters (sliders): branch angle (15-60 degrees), branch length ratio (0.5-0.9), recursion depth (3-12), trunk width (1-10px). Color: branches fade from brown (trunk) to green (tips). Leaves: small circles at terminal branches (toggle on/off). Wind effect: branches sway with sine-based animation. Season toggle: Spring (green leaves + flowers), Summer (full green), Autumn (orange/red leaves falling), Winter (bare branches + snow). Regenerate with different random seed button.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Create a Perlin noise terrain generator as a single HTML file using Canvas rendering. Generate a 2D heightmap: implement the Perlin noise algorithm in JavaScript to create a 256x256 grid. Include three visualization modes: (1) Grayscale heightmap, (2) Colored terrain (blue=water<0.3, green=plains 0.3-0.5, brown=mountains 0.5-0.7, white=snow>0.7), and (3) Contour map with 10 contour lines. Provide three sliders for parameters: scale (1-100), octaves (1-6), and persistence (0-1). Include a random seed button to regenerate the terrain. Add a 3D preview using CSS perspective to tilt and view terrain elevation changes. Include PNG export functionality. Display coordinates and height values on mouse hover.

test_cases.name: Canvas renders terrain heightmap

prompt: Create a cellular automaton (Game of Life) in one HTML file using canvas. 80x60 grid. Click cells to toggle alive/dead before starting. Start/Stop/Step buttons. Speed slider (1-60 fps). Patterns: 5 preset buttons (Glider, Blinker, Pulsar, Gosper Glider Gun, Random). Grid lines toggle. Population counter. Generation counter. Wrap-around edges toggle. Color: alive cells change color based on age (new=bright green, old=dark green). Zoom (mouse wheel). Pan (drag). Clear button. Save/load state (localStorage). Dark background.

prompt: Build a generative art studio in one HTML file using canvas. 6 algorithm modes selectable via tabs: (1) Flow field (Perlin noise vectors, particles follow field), (2) Circle packing (non-overlapping circles fill space), (3) Voronoi diagram (colored regions from random seed points), (4) Maze generator (recursive backtracker, animated), (5) L-system (configurable rules for plant-like structures), (6) Mandelbrot set (zoomable fractal). Each mode: parameter sliders, color palette selector (5 presets), animate toggle, seed randomizer, export PNG. Shared controls: canvas size selector, background color. Performance: Web Worker for heavy computation (Mandelbrot). Gallery: save to localStorage collection, view saved art.

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: 6 algorithm mode tabs present

prompt: Create an interactive fractal art generator in a single HTML file using Canvas rendering. Julia set fractal: the real and imaginary components of parameter c are controlled by mouse position (fractal pattern updates in real-time as the mouse moves). Color mapping: 5 preset color palettes (Rainbow/Fire/Ocean/Purple-Gold/Grayscale) that can be switched. Zoom: Mouse wheel to zoom (maximum 10000x). Pan: Right-click and drag. Iteration count slider (50-500, affects detail level). Anti-aliasing option (2x supersampling, toggle button). Real-time FPS display. Coordinate display (complex plane coordinates corresponding to mouse position). Recording function: Click the record button, move the mouse to automatically capture a sequence of screenshots (one frame every 200ms, maximum 50 frames), then play as a looping animation after stopping. Mandelbrot mode toggle button. Save current parameters as bookmarks (localStorage, maximum 10, loadable). Export high-resolution PNG (2x).

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Canvas renders Julia set fractal

prompt: Create a neural style transfer simulation in one HTML file using canvas. Not actual ML — simulate the effect: take a source pattern (user-selected from 5 geometric presets: circles, squares, triangles, hexagons, waves) and a style palette (5 options: Monet watercolor pastels, Van Gogh bold strokes, Mondrian primary blocks, Hokusai blue wave, Klimt gold). The algorithm: subdivide canvas into regions using Voronoi or grid, fill each region with shapes from the source pattern using colors from the style palette, add texture noise, apply edge detection outline. Controls: region count slider (50-500), shape scale, texture intensity, edge thickness. Animate: morph between two styles over 5 seconds. Gallery: render 4 thumbnails of different combinations. Full-screen toggle. Download result.

prompt: Create a CSS-only loading animation collection in one HTML file. 4 loaders in a 2x2 grid: (1) Spinning circle with gap (border + border-top-color transparent), (2) 3 dots pulsing in sequence (scale animation, staggered delay), (3) Bouncing ball (translateY with ease timing), (4) Progress bar filling left to right (width animation). All pure CSS @keyframes, no JavaScript. Each labeled below. Dark background, white/blue animations. Infinite loop.

prompt: Create a collection of breathing light effects using pure CSS in a single HTML file. Six circular "lights" arranged in a row, each in different colors (red/orange/yellow/green/blue/purple). Animation: each light's opacity cycles between 0.2 and 1.0, with a 0.3s delay between adjacent lights to create a wave effect. The box-shadow glow effect synchronizes with the opacity changes. Dark background. Pure CSS, no JavaScript.

test_cases.name: Breathing lights change opacity over time while adjacent bulbs stay phase-shifted instead of pulsing in lockstep

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>=10&&r.height>=10;};const roundish=el=>{const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();const br=s.borderRadius||'';const ok=br.includes('%')?parseFloat(br)>=40:parseFloat(br||'0')>=Math.min(r.width,r.height)*0.25;return visible(el)&&Math.abs(r.width-r.height)<=Math.max(4,Math.min(r.width,r.height)*0.35)&&ok;};const bulbs=[...document.querySelectorAll('.bulb,.light,[class*=bulb],[class*=light],div,span')].filter(roundish).slice(0,6);window.__r30_opacity_before=bulbs.map(el=>Number(getComputedStyle(el).opacity||'0').toFixed(3)).join('|');return bulbs.length>=6;})()

(()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>=10&&r.height>=10;};const roundish=el=>{const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();const br=s.borderRadius||'';const ok=br.includes('%')?parseFloat(br)>=40:parseFloat(br||'0')>=Math.min(r.width,r.height)*0.25;return visible(el)&&Math.abs(r.width-r.height)<=Math.max(4,Math.min(r.width,r.height)*0.35)&&ok;};const bulbs=[...document.querySelectorAll('.bulb,.light,[class*=bulb],[class*=light],div,span')].filter(roundish).slice(0,6);const vals=bulbs.map(el=>Number(getComputedStyle(el).opacity||'0').toFixed(3));return bulbs.length>=6 && vals.join('|')!==window.__r30_opacity_before && (new Set(vals)).size>=3;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const parseTime=v=>{const s=String(v||'0').trim(); if(s.endsWith('ms')) return parseFloat(s)/1000; return parseFloat(s)||0;};const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>=10&&r.height>=10;};const bulbs=[...document.querySelectorAll('.bulb,.light,[class*=bulb],[class*=light],div,span')].filter(visible).slice(0,6);if(bulbs.length<6) return false;const vals=bulbs.map(el=>parseTime(getComputedStyle(el).animationDelay));const uniq=[...new Set(vals.map(v=>v.toFixed(3)))].map(Number).sort((a,b)=>a-b);const span=Math.max(...vals)-Math.min(...vals);return uniq.length>=4 && span>=0.9;})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Build a CSS-only animated button hover effects showcase in one HTML file. 6 buttons in a grid, each with a different hover animation: (1) Background color slide from left, (2) Border draw-in (borders appear one by one), (3) Ripple effect from center, (4) Shake/wiggle, (5) 3D flip to reveal back text, (6) Neon glow pulse. All pure CSS transitions and animations. No JavaScript. Each button labeled with its effect name. Dark background, colorful buttons.

prompt: Create a CSS-only animated solar system in one HTML file. Sun at center (yellow with radial glow). 4 planets orbiting: Mercury (small gray, 3s orbit), Venus (medium orange, 5s), Earth (medium blue-green with tiny moon orbiting it in 1s, 8s orbit), Mars (small red, 12s). Orbit paths shown as dotted circles. Planets sized proportionally. Background: dark space. Stars using box-shadow dots. All animation via CSS @keyframes and transform: rotate + translateX. No JavaScript.

prompt: Create a collection of text animation effects using pure CSS in a single HTML file. Arrange 5 effects vertically: (1) Character-by-character typewriter (typing effect with blinking cursor), (2) Wavy text (each letter oscillates up and down with incremental delay), (3) Neon text (flickering text-shadow glow), (4) Gradient flowing text (background-clip:text with slowly shifting gradient), (5) 3D rotating text (perspective + rotateY loop). Display one effect per line with labeled effect names. Use a dark background with white/colored text. Implement entirely in CSS.

test_cases.name: Animated rows expose changing CSS motion state over time

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__round25_css_anim_before=(()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const labels=['typewriter','wavy','neon','gradient','3d'];const nodes=labels.map(label=>[...document.querySelectorAll('body *')].find(el=>visible(el)&&((el.innerText||el.textContent||'').toLowerCase().includes(label)))||null);return nodes.map(el=>{if(!el) return '';const s=getComputedStyle(el);const anims=el.getAnimations?el.getAnimations().map(a=>Math.round(a.currentTime||0)).join(','):'';return [s.animationName,s.animationDuration,s.transform,s.backgroundPosition,s.opacity,s.textShadow,anims].join('|');}).join('||');})(); return true;})()

prompt: Create CSS-only animated scene transitions in one HTML file. A page with 4 sections, each full viewport height. Scrolling between sections triggers CSS scroll-snap with animated transitions. Section 1: elements slide in from left. Section 2: elements fade in with scale. Section 3: elements rotate in from 3D perspective. Section 4: elements draw in with clip-path animation. Each section has a heading, paragraph, and decorative shapes. Navigation dots on the right side indicate current section. Pure CSS using scroll-snap, animation-timeline (or intersection observer fallback via minimal JS if needed). Gradient backgrounds per section.

test_cases.name: Canvas has non-trivial pixel data

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Build a CSS-only animated infographic poster in one HTML file. Topic: 'A Day in the Life of the Internet'. Animated stats: (1) Emails sent counter (rolling numbers CSS), (2) Google searches (progress bar filling), (3) YouTube videos watched (clock hand spinning), (4) Tweets posted (birds flying across), (5) Photos uploaded (camera shutter animation), (6) Online purchases (shopping cart filling). Each stat section has an icon (CSS-drawn), animated number/graphic, and descriptive text. Sections stagger their entrance animation on page load (sequential delay). Scroll-triggered: later sections animate when scrolled into view. Color palette: blue gradient to orange. Fully responsive. Print-friendly (static snapshot). No JavaScript for animations.

test_cases.name: Later Internet-stat sections animate when scrolled into view

steps.expression: (()=>{const norm=s=>(''+(s||'')).toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const hasBox=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&r.width>40&&r.height>40;};const tokens=['email','google','youtube','tweet','photo','purchase'];const candidates=[...document.querySelectorAll('section,article,.stat-card,.stat-section,.card,[class*=stat]')].filter(hasBox).map(el=>({el,text:norm(el.innerText||el.textContent||'')})).filter(x=>tokens.some(t=>x.text.includes(t)));const uniq=[];for(const x of candidates){if(!uniq.some(y=>y.el.contains(x.el)||x.el.contains(y.el)))uniq.push(x);}const cards=uniq.slice(0,12);const joined=cards.map(x=>x.text).join(' ');const later=cards.filter(x=>['tweet','photo','purchase','cart','shopping'].some(t=>x.text.includes(t))).slice(0,3);const state=x=>{const s=getComputedStyle(x.el);return {opacity:parseFloat(s.opacity||'1'),transform:s.transform||'',cls:''+(x.el.className||''),anim:s.animationName||'',timeline:''+(s.animationTimeline||''),play:s.animationPlayState||''};};window.__internet_scroll_cards=cards;window.__internet_scroll_later=later;window.__internet_scroll_before=later.map(state);if(later[0])later[0].el.scrollIntoView({block:'center',inline:'nearest'});return cards.length>=6&&later.length>=3&&tokens.every(t=>joined.includes(t));})()

(()=>{const norm=s=>(''+(s||'')).toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const html=norm(document.documentElement.innerHTML||'');const body=norm(document.body.innerText||'');const badTerms=['undefined','nan','syntaxerror','referenceerror','typeerror','[object object]','{{','}}'];const bad=badTerms.some(t=>body.includes(t));const later=window.__internet_scroll_later||[];const before=window.__internet_scroll_before||[];const state=x=>{const s=getComputedStyle(x.el),r=x.el.getBoundingClientRect();return {opacity:parseFloat(s.opacity||'1'),transform:s.transform||'',top:r.top,bottom:r.bottom,cls:''+(x.el.className||''),anim:s.animationName||'',timeline:''+(s.animationTimeline||''),play:s.animationPlayState||''};};const after=later.map(state);const mechanisms=['intersectionobserver','animation-timeline: view','animation-timeline:view','view-timeline','scroll-timeline','addeventlistener','onscroll'];const mechanism=mechanisms.some(t=>html.includes(t));const animatedChange=after.some((a,i)=>{const b=before[i]||{};return Math.abs((a.opacity||1)-(b.opacity||1))>=0.12||a.transform!==b.transform||a.cls!==b.cls||a.anim!==b.anim||a.play!==b.play;});const stateWords=['scroll','trigger','reveal','observe','hidden','animate','visible'];const initiallyPrepared=before.some(b=>(b.opacity||1)<0.95||b.transform!=='none'||stateWords.some(t=>(''+b.cls).toLowerCase().includes(t))||['view','scroll'].some(t=>(''+b.timeline).toLowerCase().includes(t)));const visibleNow=after.some(a=>a.opacity>0.45&&a.bottom>0&&a.top<innerHeight);const labels=later.map(x=>norm(x.el.innerText||x.el.textContent||'')).join(' ');return !bad&&mechanism&&initiallyPrepared&&animatedChange&&visibleNow&&labels.includes('tweet')&&labels.includes('photo')&&(labels.includes('purchase')||labels.includes('cart')||labels.includes('shopping'));})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Create an animated storybook page using pure CSS in a single HTML file. Scene: A complete day-night cycle animation (30-second cycle, infinite loop). Daytime: Blue sky gradient + sun rising (translateY) + white clouds drifting (translateX) + green grass + flowers blooming (scale). Sunset: Sky turns orange-red + sun setting. Night: Dark blue/black sky + moon rising + stars twinkling (opacity animation) + fireflies (small yellow dots with position animation) + city lights (window opacity). Dawn: Sky turns pink + birds flying in V-formation (translateX). All elements drawn using div + border-radius + pseudo-elements. Building silhouettes (rectangle combinations) fixed at the bottom. Time indicator (top text: Early Morning → Morning → Noon → Afternoon → Evening → Night) switches with the animation. All CSS keyframes, no JavaScript. Responsive.

prompt: Create an interactive kaleidoscope in one HTML file using canvas. Mouse position controls the pattern: moving the mouse generates symmetric reflections of colorful shapes (6-fold symmetry). Shapes drawn at mouse position are mirrored across all symmetry axes. Color cycles through rainbow over time. Trail fading effect. Click to change between 4/6/8-fold symmetry modes. Black background.

test_cases.name: Canvas renders kaleidoscope pattern

prompt: Build an interactive aurora borealis in one HTML file using canvas. Wavy curtains of green/blue/purple light undulate across a dark sky. Mouse X position controls wind (curtain drift direction and speed). Mouse Y controls intensity (brightness and width). Click to create a bright flash that ripples outward. Stars twinkle in background. Mountain silhouette at bottom. Fog/mist layer near mountains. Light reflections on a lake surface below mountains. Perlin noise for smooth wave movement. Color palette shifts slowly over time.

steps.expression: (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas');if(!c)return false;let ctx;try{ctx=c.getContext('2d',{willReadFrequently:true});}catch(e){return false;}try{const w=c.width,h=c.height;const data=ctx.getImageData(0,0,w,h).data;let green=0,blue=0,bright=0,total=0,darkBottom=0;const sx=Math.max(1,Math.floor(w/96)),sy=Math.max(1,Math.floor(h/96));for(let y=0;y<h;y+=sy){for(let x=0;x<w;x+=sx){const i=(y*w+x)*4,R=data[i],G=data[i+1],B=data[i+2],A=data[i+3];if(A<10)continue;total++;if(y>h*.72&&R+G+B<100)darkBottom++;if(R+G+B>170)bright++;if(G>90&&G>R+15&&G>=B-35)green++;if(B>90&&B>R+20)blue++;}}return total>1000&&green>=120&&blue>=1000&&bright>=300&&darkBottom>=500;}catch(e){return false;}})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Create an interactive water ripple effect using a single HTML file with Canvas rendering. Features a calm water surface with a blue gradient. Click anywhere to generate concentric circular ripples that expand outward and attenuate. Multiple clicks create multiple independent ripples; when ripples meet, they produce interference effects (constructive interference brightens, destructive interference darkens). Continuous mouse dragging generates sustained ripples (raindrop effect). Press the R key to simulate rain (numerous ripples at random positions). Includes sliders for ripple speed and decay. Reflection: ripples bounce back when reaching edges. Display the water surface with 3D perspective at the bottom (CSS perspective tilts the Canvas).

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Canvas renders calm water surface

prompt: Create an interactive magnetic field visualization in one HTML file using canvas. 500 iron filing particles (small lines) orient along the magnetic field of 2 movable magnets. Drag red (N) and blue (S) magnet circles to reposition. Particles align in real-time showing field lines. Toggle: particle view or continuous field line view (curved lines from N to S). Field strength shown as color intensity. Add magnet button (max 5). Remove magnet button. Earth's magnetic field simulation preset. 3D perspective toggle (CSS tilt).

test_cases.name: Toggle between particle/field line view

test_cases.name: Canvas renders iron filing particles

prompt: Create an interactive music visualization scene as a single HTML file using Canvas rendering. Simulate a 32-band audio spectrum using sine wave generation (not real audio). Implement 4 switchable visualization modes: (1) Bar spectrum (bottom-aligned with color gradients), (2) Circular spectrum (circular arrangement expanding outward), (3) Particle mode (particles bouncing driven by frequencies), (4) Waveform mode (continuous curve). Horizontal mouse movement controls simulated frequency variations. Spacebar toggles play/pause. BPM slider (60-180) controls the beat tempo. Three color themes (Neon/Ocean/Fire). Fullscreen Canvas with dark background and glow effects.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Canvas renders music visualization

prompt: Build an interactive ecosystem simulation in one HTML file using canvas. A pond environment with: 20 fish (triangles that swim with schooling behavior: alignment, cohesion, separation), 5 predator fish (larger, red, chase nearest prey), 30 food particles (green dots that slowly drift). Fish eat food (food disappears, fish grows slightly). Predators eat small fish. Population dynamics: fish reproduce when well-fed (split into 2), die if starving for 10 seconds. Food regenerates randomly every 2 seconds. Controls: add food (click), add fish (F key), add predator (P key), speed slider. Stats panel: fish count, predator count, food count, time elapsed. Population graph over time (SVG mini chart, updates every 5s). Day/night cycle (30s period, affects fish speed). Water caustic effect background.

test_cases.name: Canvas renders pond with fish

prompt: Create an interactive weather system simulator as a single HTML file using Canvas rendering. Scene: A small town in side view (simple rectangular houses with windows and triangular roofs, trees, roads, hilly background). Weather control panel: 5 switchable weather states: (1) Sunny: Sun + blue sky + white clouds drifting slowly, (2) Rainy: Gray sky + raindrop particles falling from above + ground water splashes + puddle reflections, (3) Snowy: Gray-white sky + snowflakes falling (rotating descent) + gradual snow accumulation on ground, (4) Thunderstorm: Dark sky + heavy rain + lightning flashes (random position white flashes + simulated sound effects) + wind-blown trees swaying, (5) Foggy: White semi-transparent overlay with distant blur. Temperature slider (-10 to 40 degrees, affecting scene: snow accumulation <0, autumn foliage 0-15, strong sunlight >25). Wind slider (0-10 scale, affecting particle direction and tree tilt angles). Time slider (0-24h, controlling sky color and lighting). Indoor lights (windows automatically light up at night). Characters (stick figures) holding umbrellas/wearing coats based on weather. Real-time display of temperature, humidity, wind speed, and apparent temperature.

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Create an interactive pixel art sandbox in one HTML file using canvas. 64x64 pixel grid. Tools: pencil (single pixel), line, rectangle, circle, fill bucket, eraser, eyedropper (pick color from canvas). Color palette: 32 colors in a grid + custom color picker. Brush size: 1-4 pixels. Layers: 3 layers (add/remove/reorder/visibility toggle/opacity slider per layer). Onion skinning: see adjacent layer faintly. Undo/redo (50 steps). Grid lines toggle. Zoom (1x-16x with scroll wheel). Pan (space+drag). Symmetry mode: horizontal/vertical/both (draws mirrored). Animation: 4-frame animation timeline at bottom, play preview button, FPS control, onion skin for animation. Export: PNG (current frame), GIF (animated, all frames), spritesheet. Import image (resize to fit grid). Reference image overlay (adjustable opacity). Keyboard shortcuts for all tools.

test_cases.name: Canvas has non-trivial pixel data

steps.expression: (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas');if(!c)return false;try{const ctx=c.getContext('2d');const d=ctx.getImageData(c.width/4,c.height/4,c.width/2,c.height/2).data;let n=0;for(let i=0;i<d.length;i+=16){if(d[i]+d[i+1]+d[i+2]>30)n++;}return n>d.length/64;}catch(e){return true;}})()

prompt: Create a Christmas-themed animated scene in one HTML file using CSS and minimal JS. Snow falling (white dots drifting down with CSS animation, random positions and sizes). A Christmas tree in the center (green triangles stacked, brown rectangle trunk, colored circle ornaments, star on top with glow). Twinkling fairy lights (colored dots along the tree with alternating opacity animation). 'Merry Christmas' text with candy-cane striped color. Gift boxes at the base (colored rectangles with ribbon). Red and green color scheme, dark blue night background.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const broken=/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]| undefined | nan /i.test(text);const media=[...document.querySelectorAll('canvas,svg,img,video')].some(visible);const surface=[...document.querySelectorAll('main,section,article,div,table,ul,ol,canvas,svg,img,video')].some(el=>{if(!visible(el))return false;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width*r.height>=1200;});return !broken&&(media||text.length>=20||surface);})()

test_cases.name: Canvas has non-trivial pixel data

steps.expression: (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas');if(!c)return false;try{const ctx=c.getContext('2d');const d=ctx.getImageData(c.width/4,c.height/4,c.width/2,c.height/2).data;let n=0;for(let i=0;i<d.length;i+=16){if(d[i]+d[i+1]+d[i+2]>30)n++;}return n>d.length/64;}catch(e){return true;}})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const surface=document.querySelector('canvas,svg');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=range],select')].filter(visible).length;const darkHint=true;let themeOk=true;if(darkHint){const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];if(nums.length>=3){themeOk=Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<360;}}return surface!==null&&themeOk&&(controls>=1||(document.body.innerText||'').trim().length>=20);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["merry christmas", "christmas", "merry"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

prompt: Create a Spring Festival themed animated scene as a single HTML file. Red background with gold elements. Animations: fireworks (CSS animation, multiple colorful dots rising from the bottom then scattering, looping), lanterns (two red lanterns hanging on the left and right, swaying slowly), spring couplets (vertical text with the "Fu" (blessing) character centered, pulsing glow effect). Falling golden confetti (similar to snowflake animation). Large "Happy New Year" text flashing. All CSS animations with minimal JS.

prompt: Build a Halloween interactive scene in one HTML file using canvas. Night scene: full moon (with moving clouds passing over it), haunted house silhouette, bare tree with owl. Spooky elements: bats flying in figure-8 patterns, ghost floating up from behind the house (semi-transparent, wobbling), jack-o-lanterns with flickering candle glow (3 pumpkins with different carved faces). Interactive: click anywhere to summon a spider that drops down on a web strand (CSS or canvas). Mouse movement creates a flashlight effect (circular bright area follows cursor, rest is darker). Fog at ground level. 'Happy Halloween' with dripping blood text effect. Eerie color palette: orange, purple, black, green.

test_cases.name: Halloween scene renders on canvas

prompt: Create an interactive Mid-Autumn Festival scene as a single HTML file using Canvas rendering. Night sky background (deep blue gradient). Large round moon (yellow, with simple crater texture). Jade rabbit silhouette inside the moon. Sky lanterns rising slowly from the bottom (6 lanterns at different positions, orange glowing). Falling osmanthus flowers (small yellow dot particles). Lotus pond: water surface reflection at the bottom (blurred reflections of moon and sky lanterns), 3 lotus flowers (pink). Interactions: Click to release new sky lanterns. Long press to generate wish text (input box pops up, text follows lantern after input). "Reunion" text gradually appears. Music button (simulated, button toggles icon).

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const surface=document.querySelector('canvas,svg');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=range],select')].filter(visible).length;const darkHint=false;let themeOk=true;if(darkHint){const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];if(nums.length>=3){themeOk=Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<360;}}return surface!==null&&themeOk&&(controls>=1||(document.body.innerText||'').trim().length>=20);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["reunion"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Canvas renders Mid-Autumn scene

prompt: Create a Valentine's Day animated card in one HTML file. Pink/red gradient background. A large heart in the center built from smaller hearts that assemble (particles fly in from edges to form the heart shape over 3 seconds). After assembly: heartbeat animation (scale pulse). Floating smaller hearts rise from bottom like bubbles. Cursor leaves a trail of tiny hearts. Click triggers burst of hearts from click point. Message reveals after heart assembles: 'Happy Valentine's Day' with elegant script styling. Confetti cannon effect on click. Rose petal shower (pink ovals drifting down). Toggle: add custom message (text input, replaces default message).

test_cases.name: Canvas renders Valentine's scene

prompt: Build a New Year's Eve countdown celebration in one HTML file. Full-screen canvas scene. Countdown timer: large digital display counting down from 10 (or set custom time). At 00:00: massive firework display (20 simultaneous fireworks across the sky with different colors and patterns — peony, chrysanthemum, willow, ring), confetti cannon from both sides, 'HAPPY NEW YEAR 2026' text with 3D zoom-in animation, crowd cheering sound simulation (Web Audio noise burst), champagne bottle popping animation (cork flying up with bubbles). Before midnight: city skyline silhouette, clock tower with minute hand approaching 12, crowd silhouettes at bottom, anticipation particle effects (sparkles). After fireworks: dancing light beams, aurora-like waves, party mode with disco ball (rotating sphere with light reflections). Interactive: click anywhere for extra fireworks. Toggle music (simulated beats). Year selector (change the year displayed). Share button (copies a greeting to clipboard). Restart countdown button.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const surface=document.querySelector('canvas,svg');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=range],select')].filter(visible).length;const darkHint=false;let themeOk=true;if(darkHint){const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];if(nums.length>=3){themeOk=Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<360;}}return surface!==null&&themeOk&&(controls>=1||(document.body.innerText||'').trim().length>=20);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["happy new year 2026", "00:00:", "2026", "12,"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Canvas renders countdown/fireworks scene

prompt: Create a simple rain simulation in one HTML file using canvas. Blue-gray sky gradient background. Rain drops (thin white/light-blue lines) falling at a slight angle. Puddle ripples at the bottom (expanding circles where drops land). Lightning flash every 10 seconds (full-screen white flash for 0.1s). Cloud layer at top (dark gray overlapping circles). Continuous animation. Speed slider to control rain intensity.

test_cases.name: Canvas renders rain simulation

prompt: Build a forest fire spread simulation in one HTML file using canvas. A 50x50 grid representing a forest. Cell states: empty (black), tree (green), burning (red/orange with flickering), burned (gray). Click to ignite a tree. Fire spreads to adjacent trees with probability based on wind direction. Controls: wind direction (4 arrow buttons or compass selector), wind speed slider (affects spread probability), moisture slider (lower=faster spread). Regrowth: burned cells slowly become trees again (toggle). Statistics: trees remaining %, time, trees burned. Reset button. Speed slider. Pause/play. Heatmap overlay toggle showing fire risk.

prompt: Create a four-season changing scene in a single HTML file using Canvas rendering. A large tree is centered and changes with the seasons: Spring (tender green leaves growing gradually + pink cherry blossom petals falling), Summer (lush dark green foliage + cicada sound wave effects + heat wave distortion), Autumn (leaves turning yellow and red + falling leaves accumulating on the ground), and Winter (bare branches + snowflakes falling + snow accumulation on the ground). The sky color changes with the seasons. Each season lasts 8 seconds with smooth transitions. Display the current season name and month at the bottom. Bird flocks appear in spring and summer. Include manual switch buttons (4 season buttons) and an auto loop toggle.

test_cases.name: Season progression updates the label and rendered scene over time

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__round25_nature_before={scene:(()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas'); if(!c) return ''; const ctx=c.getContext('2d'); const w=Math.max(1,Math.min(32,c.width||32)); const h=Math.max(1,Math.min(32,c.height||32)); let data; try{data=ctx.getImageData(0,0,w,h).data;}catch(e){return 'tainted';} let hash=0; for(let i=0;i<data.length;i+=4){hash=((hash<<5)-hash + data[i] + data[i+1] + data[i+2] + data[i+3])>>>0;} const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').toLowerCase(); const season=(text.match(/spring|summer|autumn|winter|春|夏|秋|冬/i)||[''])[0]; return String(hash)+'|'+season;})(), label:(()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').trim(); const match=text.match(/(Spring|Summer|Autumn|Winter|春|夏|秋|冬|Jan|Feb|Mar|Apr|May|Jun|Jul|Aug|Sep|Oct|Nov|Dec)/i); return match?match[0]:'';})()}; return true;})()

test_cases.name: Canvas renders the seasonal tree scene

prompt: Create a terrain erosion simulation in one HTML file using canvas. Generate a heightmap terrain using Perlin noise (256x256). Simulate hydraulic erosion: rain drops fall on random positions, flow downhill (following gradient), pick up sediment, deposit when slowing. Visualize: heightmap as colored terrain (blue water, green lowlands, brown mountains, white peaks). Show erosion in real-time (terrain slowly changes). Water flow visualization: toggle to show water accumulation (blue overlay, brighter = more flow). Controls: rain rate, erosion strength, deposition rate, iterations slider. Before/after comparison: split-screen toggle. Cross-section view: click a horizontal line on terrain, show elevation profile below as SVG chart. 3D preview: CSS perspective tilt. Export heightmap as grayscale PNG. Stats: min/max elevation, water volume, total erosion.
