test_cases.name: Canvas renders terrain heightmap

prompt: Create a complete ecosystem simulator in a single HTML file with Canvas rendering. Features a top-down view of an island (green island in blue ocean, irregular shape generated by Perlin noise). Ecosystem components: Grass (green, auto-growing), Rabbits (white dots, eat grass, reproduce, 30s lifespan), Foxes (orange dots, eat rabbits, reproduce, 60s lifespan), Eagles (gray dots, eat rabbits, fast flight speed, 45s lifespan). Population dynamics: Food chain balance, overpopulation → food depletion → population collapse → recovery cycle. Control panel: Add animal buttons (for each type), initial quantity sliders (Rabbits 10-100, Foxes 2-20, Eagles 1-10). Population chart (SVG): Real-time line graph with 3 lines (Rabbit/Fox/Eagle) showing population changes. Statistics: Population counts for each species, birth/death counters, simulation days. Speed control (0.5x-5x). Pause/Resume. Disaster buttons (Drought: grass reduced by 50%, Plague: random 30% death). Day/night cycle (affects animal behavior: rabbits inactive at night, foxes more active). Minimap showing heat distribution.

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Create an SVG illustration of a cartoon cat sitting upright. Round head with pointed ears, oval eyes with pupils, small triangle nose, whiskers (3 per side), round body, curved tail. Orange tabby coloring with darker stripes. Sitting on a green grassy ground with a blue sky background. viewBox 0 0 400 400. No external resources.

prompt: Create a detailed SVG illustration of an underwater coral reef scene. Elements: wavy blue water gradient background, 5 different coral formations (branching, brain, fan shapes using paths), 3 tropical fish (different colors, stripe patterns), seaweed (wavy green paths), bubbles (semi-transparent circles rising), a starfish on the sandy bottom (pentagon with orange gradient), a small treasure chest. Use linearGradient and radialGradient for depth effects. viewBox 0 0 800 500.

test_cases.name: SVG renders
Coral reef includes the prompt modules

steps.expression: (()=>{const svg=document.querySelector('svg'); if(!svg) return false; const paths=svg.querySelectorAll('path').length; const circles=svg.querySelectorAll('circle').length; const polygons=svg.querySelectorAll('polygon').length; const rects=svg.querySelectorAll('rect').length; const translucent=[...svg.querySelectorAll('circle')].filter(el=>{const s=getComputedStyle(el); const op=parseFloat(s.opacity||el.getAttribute('opacity')||'1'); const fo=parseFloat(s.fillOpacity||el.getAttribute('fill-opacity')||'1'); return op<1 || fo<1;}).length; return paths>=12 && circles>=4 && polygons>=1 && rects>=1 && translucent>=3;})()

test_cases.name: Reef structure remains visible after a short pause

steps.expression: (()=>{const svg=document.querySelector('svg'); if(!svg||svg.getAttribute('viewBox')!=='0 0 800 500') return false; const shapes=svg.querySelectorAll('path,circle,ellipse,polygon,rect').length; const bubbles=[...svg.querySelectorAll('circle')].filter(el=>{const s=getComputedStyle(el); return parseFloat(s.opacity||el.getAttribute('opacity')||'1')<1 || parseFloat(s.fillOpacity||el.getAttribute('fill-opacity')||'1')<1;}).length; return shapes>=20 && bubbles>=3;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(()=>{const walker=document.createTreeWalker(document.body,NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT,{acceptNode(node){const p=node.parentElement;if(!p) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;if(p.closest('pre,code,script,style,textarea')) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT;}});let text='';while(walker.nextNode()){text+=' '+(walker.currentNode.nodeValue||'');}return text.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();})();return !(/\[object Object\]|\bundefined\b|\bNaN\b/.test(text));})()

prompt: Create a Chinese-style courtyard illustration using SVG. Elements: red pavilion with upturned eaves (curved roof drawn with path), moon gate, bamboo (green rectangles + leaves), rockery (gray irregular path), koi pond (blue ellipse + two orange fish), stone path (gray rectangles arranged), cherry blossom tree (brown trunk + pink dot flowers). Background: light yellow rice paper color. Use traditional Chinese color palette (vermilion/indigo/emerald/ink black). viewBox 0 0 800 500.

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Create a detailed SVG isometric city block illustration. Buildings: 3-4 buildings of different heights with windows (grid of small rectangles), a shop with awning, a tall office tower with glass facade effect. Street: gray road with white lane markings, crosswalk. Vehicles: a bus (side view, isometric perspective), a taxi. Trees: 5 stylized trees (circle canopy on trunk). People: 3 simple human figures (stick-figure-plus style). Street elements: traffic light, bench, mailbox. All in isometric projection (30-degree angles). Flat color style, consistent shadow direction (bottom-right). viewBox 0 0 1000 700.

steps.expression: (()=>{const svg=document.querySelector('svg'); if(svg) return svg.querySelectorAll('*').length>=8; if(document.querySelectorAll('div,span').length>=10) return true; return false;})()

test_cases.name: Prompt-grounded structure is present instead of a generic shell

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const svg=document.querySelector('svg');const shapes=document.querySelectorAll('svg path,svg circle,svg rect,svg polygon,svg ellipse,svg line').length;return svg!==null&&shapes>=4;})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["3-4", "30-", "1000", "700.", "700"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "svg path, svg rect, svg polygon, svg circle, svg ellipse, svg g", "gte": 50}, {"selector": "svg path, svg circle, svg rect, svg polygon, svg ellipse, svg line", "gte": 5}, {"selector": "path, circle, rect, polygon, ellipse", "gte": 5}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(true)&&(structureHits>=2);})()

test_cases.name: JS validation checks prompt-grounded structure instead of a malformed or vacuous selector

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const svg=document.querySelector('svg');const shapes=document.querySelectorAll('svg path,svg circle,svg rect,svg polygon,svg ellipse,svg line').length;return svg!==null&&shapes>=4;})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["3-4", "30-", "1000", "700.", "700"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "svg path, svg rect, svg polygon, svg circle, svg ellipse, svg g", "gte": 50}, {"selector": "svg path, svg circle, svg rect, svg polygon, svg ellipse, svg line", "gte": 5}, {"selector": "path, circle, rect, polygon, ellipse", "gte": 5}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=1)&&(structureHits>=1);})()

test_cases.name: Rendered UI does not show undefined, NaN, or object placeholders

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(()=>{const walker=document.createTreeWalker(document.body,NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT,{acceptNode(node){const p=node.parentElement;if(!p) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;if(p.closest('pre,code,script,style,textarea')) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT;}});let text='';while(walker.nextNode()){text+=' '+(walker.currentNode.nodeValue||'');}return text.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();})();return !(/\[object Object\]|\bundefined\b|\bNaN\b/.test(text));})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Create a detailed SVG illustration of a steampunk mechanical clock. Central large clock face with roman numerals (I-XII), ornate hour/minute hands, gear teeth around the rim. Behind the face: 5 visible brass gears of different sizes interlocking. Steam pipes (curved paths with rivets), pressure gauge (small circle with needle), chains, and cogs. Brass/copper/bronze color palette using gradients. Aged metal texture simulated with noise-like patterns. Glass dome effect over the face (semi-transparent). viewBox 0 0 600 600.

steps.selector: svg path, svg circle, svg rect, svg polygon

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const target=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg,svg *')].find(el=>visible(el));if(target){target.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseover',{bubbles:true})); if(target.click) target.click();}return true;})()

prompt: Create an SVG animation of a bouncing ball. A circle that bounces up and down with squash effect (slightly flattening at the bottom bounce point). Use SMIL animate elements. Ball is red with a highlight gradient. Shadow below that scales with ball height. Background: light gray. Loop infinitely. Duration: 2 seconds per bounce cycle. viewBox 0 0 300 400.

prompt: Create a rotating sun using SVG and SMIL animation. A yellow circle in the center with 12 surrounding rays (rectangles, alternating between long and short). The entire sun rotates slowly around its center (10 seconds per revolution). The rays pulsate with alternating lengths (animate changing length). Background: light blue sky gradient. A white cloud drifts slowly from left to right (animateTransform translate). viewBox 0 0 400 400.

prompt: Create an SVG animated loading spinner collection. 4 different spinners in a 2x2 grid: (1) Classic rotating circle with a gap (stroke-dashoffset animation), (2) Three dots pulsing in sequence (scale animation), (3) Bars equalizer style (5 bars with varying height animation, staggered timing), (4) Morphing shape (square that smoothly morphs to circle and back using animate on rx/ry). All using SMIL or CSS animations. Each spinner labeled below. Dark background, colorful spinners.

prompt: Build an SVG animated weather scene that cycles through 4 seasons. Spring: rain drops falling + flowers growing; Summer: bright sun + heat waves; Autumn: leaves falling and changing color; Winter: snowflakes drifting down. Each season lasts 5 seconds, smooth crossfade transition between them. Season name displayed. Use SMIL animate, animateTransform, and animateMotion. viewBox 0 0 600 400.

steps.selector: svg path, svg circle, svg rect, svg polygon

prompt: Create an SVG animated mechanical watch face. Features: second hand rotating smoothly (60s/revolution, CSS animation), minute hand (60min/revolution), hour hand (12h/revolution). Pendulum swinging below (sinusoidal motion). Subtle metallic gradients on all parts. Spring coil animation (expanding/contracting). viewBox 0 0 500 600.

prompt: Create an SVG animated story scene: sunrise to sunset. Scene: City skyline on the horizon (silhouettes of 5 buildings). The sun rises from the lower left, passes over the top, and sets to the lower right (animateMotion along an arched path, 20-second cycle). Sky color changes with sun position: dawn (pink-orange) → noon (blue) → dusk (purple-red) → night (dark blue, stars appear). Building windows light up at night (opacity animation). Water surface reflection (flip + ripple effect). Flock of birds flying in V-formation (animateMotion). Moon rises at night. The entire loop repeats infinitely. viewBox 0 0 800 500.

prompt: Create a cartoon face using only CSS (no SVG, Canvas, or images). A yellow circular face, two oval eyes with black pupils, eyebrows (border arcs), a round red nose, a smiling mouth (border curve), and two pink circular cheeks. Use only div elements, border-radius, background-color, and pseudo-elements (::before, ::after). Centered on a light blue background.

prompt: Draw a house using pure CSS (without using SVG/Canvas/images). Square house body (brown), triangular roof (red, implemented using border), rectangular door (dark brown), two square windows (light blue + cross window frames), circular door knob, chimney (rectangle on the right side of the roof). Green grass, light blue sky background. Sun (yellow circle) in the top right corner. All implemented using div + CSS.

prompt: Create a CSS-only panda bear using only HTML divs and CSS (no SVG, Canvas, or images). Detailed panda: white round head, black eye patches (ellipses), black ears, black nose, curved mouth, white body, black arms and legs. Panda is sitting and holding a bamboo stick (green rectangle with leaves). Background: gradient green bamboo forest (repeating vertical green bars with varying opacity). Add a subtle breathing animation (body slightly scales 1.0 to 1.02 every 3 seconds).

prompt: Draw a vintage typewriter using pure CSS (no SVG/Canvas/images). Body: gray rounded rectangle. Keyboard area: 3 rows of keys, each row having 10 circular keycaps with letters. Paper: white rectangle extending from the top with typed text. Ribbon: black strip. Return lever: horizontal bar on the right side. Keys have hover effects (color change and shadow variation when pressed). Typing animation: text on the paper appears character by character (typing effect). Dark wood grain background. All implemented using divs and CSS.

prompt: Create a CSS-only animated solar system model (no SVG, Canvas, or images). Sun at center (yellow radial gradient glow). 8 planets orbiting at different distances and speeds: Mercury (tiny, gray, 3s), Venus (medium, orange, 5s), Earth (medium, blue-green with tiny white moon orbiting it, 8s), Mars (small, red, 12s), Jupiter (large, striped orange, 20s), Saturn (with CSS ring, 30s), Uranus (cyan, tilted, 40s), Neptune (blue, 50s). Orbits shown as dotted circles. Planet sizes proportional. Star field background (box-shadow dots). Hover a planet to show its name tooltip.

prompt: Create a CSS-only animated cityscape at night (no SVG, Canvas, or images). Skyline: 8 buildings of different heights and widths with lit windows (grid of yellow dots, some randomly off). Buildings have different architectural styles (flat top, pointed, antenna). Foreground: a road with animated car headlights passing (glowing dots moving horizontally). Sky: gradient from dark purple to black, twinkling stars (CSS animation on box-shadow opacity), a neon sign that flickers. Water reflection at the bottom (mirrored buildings with wave distortion using CSS transform). Moon with craters (multiple border-radius). Airplane with blinking light crosses the sky slowly.

test_cases.name: Water reflection, moon craters, airplane light, and road headlights are CSS-defined

prompt: Create a set of 6 SVG food icons arranged in a 3x2 grid. Icons: Coffee Cup (cup with steam lines), Pizza (triangle with dots), Burger (three semi-circular layers), Sushi (ellipse with stripes), Cake (trapezoid with candle), and Ice Cream (triangular cone with round scoop). Use a consistent style: 48x48px canvas, 2px stroke, rounded corners, and soft pastel fills. Display the corresponding name beneath each icon.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const icons=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg')].filter(visible).filter(svg=>(svg.getAttribute('viewBox')||'').trim()==='0 0 48 48');const text=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase();const foods=['coffee','pizza','burger','sushi','cake','ice cream'];if(icons.length<6||!foods.every(f=>text.includes(f)))return false;let exact2Total=0;return icons.slice(0,6).every(svg=>{let exact2=0;for(const el of svg.querySelectorAll('path,circle,rect,polygon,ellipse,line,polyline')){const stroke=(el.getAttribute('stroke')||getComputedStyle(el).stroke||'').trim();if(!stroke||stroke==='none'||stroke==='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)')continue;const sw=(el.getAttribute('stroke-width')||getComputedStyle(el).strokeWidth||'').trim();if(sw==='2'||sw==='2px')exact2++;}exact2Total+=exact2;return exact2>=2;})&&exact2Total>=18;})()

prompt: Create a comprehensive SVG icon set of 12 navigation/UI icons in a 4x3 grid. Icons: home, search, menu (hamburger), close (X), back arrow, forward arrow, up chevron, down chevron, plus, minus, check, info (i in circle). Two style variants toggle: outlined (stroke only) and filled (solid). All icons 32x32, consistent 2px stroke weight. Icon names below each. CSS variable for icon color (changeable via a color picker input). Export all as a single SVG sprite sheet button.

prompt: Build an animated SVG icon set of 8 status/notification icons. Icons: loading spinner (rotating), success checkmark (draw-in animation), error X (shake animation), warning triangle (pulse glow), info bubble (bounce in), download arrow (falling motion), upload arrow (rising motion), sync arrows (continuous rotation). Each icon loops its animation. Play/pause toggle per icon. Grid layout 4x2. Consistent 48x48 size. Modern rounded style.

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: Create an SVG icon design system with 16 e-commerce icons in a 4x4 grid. Icons: cart, bag, credit card, truck (delivery), package, barcode, receipt, tag (price), gift, store, wallet, coins, coupon, star (rating), return arrow, shield (secure). Interactive: click icon to select it and show SVG code in a code preview panel below. Size slider (16px to 64px) resizes all icons. Stroke width slider (1-4px). Color scheme presets (3 palettes). Copy SVG button per icon. Search/filter icons by name. Responsive grid.

test_cases.name: Icons render
Icon grid binds at least 14 prompted e-commerce names to visible SVG drawings

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>12&&r.height>12;};const norm=s=>(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim().toLowerCase();const labels=['cart','bag','credit card','truck','package','barcode','receipt','tag','gift','store','wallet','coins','coupon','star','return','shield'];const blocks=[...document.querySelectorAll('article,li,button,[role=button],.icon,.card,[class*=icon],[class*=card],svg')].filter(visible).map(el=>{const text=norm([el.innerText,el.textContent,el.getAttribute('aria-label'),el.getAttribute('title'),el.querySelector('title')?.textContent,el.querySelector('desc')?.textContent].filter(Boolean).join(' '));const svg=el.matches('svg')?el:el.querySelector('svg');const shapes=svg?[...svg.querySelectorAll('path,circle,rect,polygon,polyline,line,ellipse')].filter(visible).length:0;const box=(svg||el).getBoundingClientRect();return {text,shapes,area:box.width*box.height};});const matched=new Set();for(const label of labels){const words=label.split(/\s+/);const hit=blocks.some(b=>words.every(w=>b.text.includes(w))&&b.shapes>=2&&b.area>=100);if(hit)matched.add(label);}return matched.size>=14&&matched.has('cart')&&matched.has('credit card')&&matched.has('shield')&&matched.has('return');})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()
